violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee did not wash hands before putting on gloves

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Sandwiches and salads found under prep table were not labeled with used by dates or date of made. See disposal section.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. Insects were observed flying around on pizza dough and cookies set out to cool.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
